description: Skip Groq AI entirely for instant results, make email/WhatsApp/notifications fire-and-forget non-blocking so nothing delays the redirect to the result page.
steps: In app/routers/exam.py: Replace the asyncio.wait_for AI feedback block with direct call to _generate_fallback_feedback()
In app/routers/exam.py: Add async helper _send_email_safe() that wraps send_result_email in try/except
In app/routers/exam.py: Add async helper _send_whatsapp_safe() that wraps send_whatsapp_notification in try/except
In app/routers/exam.py: Add async helper _schedule_followup_safe() that handles the 7-day follow-up DB insert in try/except
In app/routers/exam.py: Replace blocking email/WhatsApp/notification code with asyncio.ensure_future() calls
acceptance_criteria: Groq AI is never called during submit - fallback feedback is used directly
Email sending does not block the redirect response
WhatsApp sending does not block the redirect response
Follow-up notification scheduling does not block the redirect response
Result page loads instantly after submission
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/Autonomous-Operation-Management-System- && pyenv global 3.11.15 && python -m pytest tests/ -q
findings: All 37 tests pass. Removed Groq AI call entirely - uses _generate_fallback_feedback() directly for instant response. Email, WhatsApp, and 7-day follow-up notification scheduling all converted to fire-and-forget using asyncio.ensure_future() with safe wrappers that catch all exceptions. Result page now loads instantly after submission.
